economic_notes: Nation has 1/6th ownership in Seven Generations Environmental Services Ltd. (equity method). Ruby Creek Art Gallery is a fully consolidated subsidiary.
notes: Nation has 94 total members residing both on and off reserve. Governance by one Chief and one Councillor selected through hereditary process. Portfolio investments declined from $9.18M to $8.55M due to unrealized losses of $467,078 on Scotia Wealth Management securities. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($746,753) + Province of BC ($497,608) + BC First Nations Gaming Revenue ($271,354) + First Nations Education Steering Committee ($60,226) + Stó:lo Xwexwilmexw Treaty Association ($275,000) = $1,850,941. Deferred revenue of $24,877 is new this year from First Nations Emergency Services Society and First Nations Education Steering Committee. Debt of $41,078 is unchanged from prior year with no principal repayment disclosed. Schedules 1 and 2 referenced but not fully visible in provided pages.
